kubejs.ponder.tag.getting_started: The Case of the Missing Bark
kubejs.ponder.tag.decoration.description: To be honest, this isn't very nice...
kubejs.ponder.0.text_2: Let's cut off some excess leaves
kubejs.ponder.0.text_3: Randomly select a piece of wood
kubejs.ponder.0.text_4: Now you've completed stripping wood once
kubejs.ponder.1.text_1: This is a decorative method for regular floors
kubejs.ponder.1.text_2: Typically, use 2x2 stripped wood and 2x2 regular wood arranged alternately
kubejs.ponder.1.text_3: Therefore, this type of decoration looks particularly comfortable
kubejs.ponder.2.text_1: This is a simple yet attractive decorative method
kubejs.ponder.2.text_2: Arrange stripped wood in alternating orientations
kubejs.ponder.2.text_3: Looks like tiger skin cake, right? So this decoration emphasizes matching very much
kubejs.ponder.3.text_1: This is a relatively complex decorative method
kubejs.ponder.3.text_2: First, use stripped wood to form a 'Hui' character shape
kubejs.ponder.3.text_3: Then place stripped logs facing upward in the center of the 'Hui' shape
kubejs.ponder.3.text_4: Although this decoration is complex, it also has a touch of elegance
kubejs.ponder.4.text_1: This is a decorative method inspired by real life
kubejs.ponder.4.text_2: Before that, you need to find the pattern first
kubejs.ponder.4.text_4: If not, it's okay. Just remember this is the Three-Six-Nine Pattern
kubejs.ponder.beacon.header: A Beam of Light Shooting Through the World
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_1: Before starting to build a beacon, you need to find a relatively flat place
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_10: But the beacon itself can only be placed in the center of the base
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_11: Similarly, the minimum 3x3 base can also activate the beacon
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_2: Of course, digging out an area yourself is also a good idea
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_3: Here we use a standard 5x5 beacon base. The beacon base can be composed of iron blocks, gold blocks, emerald blocks, diamond blocks, or netherite blocks
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_4: Continue building upward with a 3x3 base
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_5: Next, we place the beacon at the blue marker
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_6: After placing the beacon correctly, it will produce a beam of light shooting into the sky
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_7: We can select buff effects through the beacon's interface
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_8: The larger the beacon structure, the more buff effects available (up to 4 buffs)
kubejs.ponder.beacon.text_9: The beacon base can also be composed of different mineral blocks
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_1: It looks like you're ready to enter the Nether!
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_2: But before that, please make sure you have enough equipment and food!
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_3: Before building, find a suitable location for the frame
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_4: Here we use the most standard building method
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_5: Use your obsidian to build a 4x5 frame
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_6: The minimum frame size is 4×5, and the maximum is 23×23
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_7: The inside of the frame must be empty; there should be no blocks
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_8: After building the obsidian frame, use a flint and steel or fire charge to ignite the inside of the obsidian
kubejs.ponder.nether_0.text_9: Now you can enter the portal and travel to the Nether!
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_1: This is an abandoned portal. You can find it in the Overworld and the Nether
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_2: Notably, they can generate directly on the ground, as well as underground, underwater, and under the lava seas of the Nether
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_3: See the chest next to it?
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_4: It usually contains useful items such as gold ingots, flint and steel, and obsidian
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_5: The amount of obsidian in the chest is usually 1-2 pieces
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_6: If you have leftover obsidian, you can place the remaining obsidian on the portal frame (excluding crying obsidian)
kubejs.ponder.nether_1.text_7: Just like before, activate it with flint and steel or a fire charge
